narrative:
Ashville-North (precinct in Pickaway County) has 1,494 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.4 percentage points.
